hero_subtitle: Empowering farmers with AI-powered crop price predictions, market insights, and personalized recommendations to maximize profits
feature1_desc: AI-powered predictions of future crop prices based on historical APMC market data and seasonal trends
feature2_desc: Smart suggestions on which crops to plant based on market demand and expected profitability
feature3_desc: Ideal planting schedules to maximize yield and align with market price peaks
feature4_desc: Compare prices across nearby APMC markets to find the best selling price for your produce
feature5_desc: Interactive dashboard with real-time insights, charts, and personalized analytics
feature6_desc: Available in English, Hindi, and Marathi for better accessibility
about_text1: Harvest Horizon is an innovative agriculture analytics platform designed to help farmers make informed decisions using data analysis and machine learning.
about_text2: By analyzing historical APMC market data, we provide accurate price predictions, crop recommendations, and market insights to maximize farmer profits and reduce losses.
dashboard_subtitle: Real-time insights and predictions for your farming decisions
